items.title: S01E01 - Rescue
items.summary: Jimmy Gibson and his older brother Bill are flying to America by plane with Mitch the monkey when their plane crashes. The Air Sea Rescue team can find no trace of their life raft through the dense fog, but at Black Rock Laboratory, the newly-completed Supercar is ready to be put to the test and Mike Mercury flies out to rescue the trio.

infolabels.title: Rescue
infolabels.plot: Jimmy Gibson and his older brother Bill are flying to America by plane with Mitch the monkey when their plane crashes. The Air Sea Rescue team can find no trace of their life raft through the dense fog, but at Black Rock Laboratory, the newly-completed Supercar is ready to be put to the test and Mike Mercury flies out to rescue the trio.

items.title: S01E02 - False Alarm
items.summary: Masterspy and Zarin use a phony distress call to lure Supercar to them, and after they have Mike captured and drugged, who will be able to stop them from making off with the super vehicle?

infolabels.title: False Alarm
infolabels.plot: Masterspy and Zarin use a phony distress call to lure Supercar to them, and after they have Mike captured and drugged, who will be able to stop them from making off with the super vehicle?

items.title: S01E03 - The Talisman of Sargon
items.summary: With Dr. Beaker's unwitting help, Masterspy locates and steals the legendary lost talisman of Sargon, which supposedly has magical powers that will allow him to take over an oil sheik's riches.

infolabels.title: The Talisman of Sargon
infolabels.plot: With Dr. Beaker's unwitting help, Masterspy locates and steals the legendary lost talisman of Sargon, which supposedly has magical powers that will allow him to take over an oil sheik's riches.

items.title: S01E04 - What Goes Up
items.summary: An Air Force test to explode a new rocket fuel in the upper atmosphere goes awry, and only Supercar has a chance of getting close enough to detonate it before it falls back to earth.

infolabels.title: What Goes Up
infolabels.plot: An Air Force test to explode a new rocket fuel in the upper atmosphere goes awry, and only Supercar has a chance of getting close enough to detonate it before it falls back to earth.

items.title: S01E05 - Amazonian Adventure
items.summary: When Mitch the monkey falls ill with sleeping sickness, Mike and Dr. Beaker head for the Amazon jungle to retrieve a special plant that can cure him, but they are captured by a tribe of headhunters.

infolabels.title: Amazonian Adventure
infolabels.plot: When Mitch the monkey falls ill with sleeping sickness, Mike and Dr. Beaker head for the Amazon jungle to retrieve a special plant that can cure him, but they are captured by a tribe of headhunters.

items.title: S01E06 - Grounded
items.summary: When sabotage keeps Mike from pursuing two thieves via the skies, he continues to follow them using his vehicle as an ordinary car.

infolabels.title: Grounded
infolabels.plot: When sabotage keeps Mike from pursuing two thieves via the skies, he continues to follow them using his vehicle as an ordinary car.

items.title: S01E07 - Keep It Cool
items.summary: Bill Gibson and Beaker come under attack by Masterspy as they are transporting an experimental new fuel across the desert. Mike must rescue them before the volatile fuel warms up past its freezing point and explodes.

infolabels.title: Keep It Cool
infolabels.plot: Bill Gibson and Beaker come under attack by Masterspy as they are transporting an experimental new fuel across the desert. Mike must rescue them before the volatile fuel warms up past its freezing point and explodes.

items.title: S01E08 - Jungle Hazard
items.summary: Masterspy tries to take over an old rubber plantation in Malaysia, not realizing that the girl who now owns the estate is Beaker's cousin, and she has obtained the assistance of Mike and Supercar.

infolabels.title: Jungle Hazard
infolabels.plot: Masterspy tries to take over an old rubber plantation in Malaysia, not realizing that the girl who now owns the estate is Beaker's cousin, and she has obtained the assistance of Mike and Supercar.

items.title: S01E09 - High Tension
items.summary: Masterspy kidnaps Dr. Beaker and tries to make off with Supercar, but he gets a nasty shock when he finds out that Mike can take over part of the vehicle's operation by remote control.

infolabels.title: High Tension
infolabels.plot: Masterspy kidnaps Dr. Beaker and tries to make off with Supercar, but he gets a nasty shock when he finds out that Mike can take over part of the vehicle's operation by remote control.

items.title: S01E10 - Island Incident
items.summary: Supercar's underwater capabilities come in handy when Mike receives a call for help from the deposed president of the island nation of Pelota.

infolabels.title: Island Incident
infolabels.plot: Supercar's underwater capabilities come in handy when Mike receives a call for help from the deposed president of the island nation of Pelota.

items.title: S01E11 - Ice-Fall
items.summary: Exploring a frozen waterfall in an underground mountain cavern, Beaker is trapped by an avalanche. Can Supercar's powerful engines melt the ice in time to save him?

infolabels.title: Ice-Fall
infolabels.plot: Exploring a frozen waterfall in an underground mountain cavern, Beaker is trapped by an avalanche. Can Supercar's powerful engines melt the ice in time to save him?

items.title: S01E12 - Phantom Piper
items.summary: Mike and his friends go to Scotland to solve the mystery of a castle's phantom bagpiper and keep a woman from being swindled out of a valuable gem.

infolabels.title: Phantom Piper
infolabels.plot: Mike and his friends go to Scotland to solve the mystery of a castle's phantom bagpiper and keep a woman from being swindled out of a valuable gem.

items.title: S01E13 - Pirate Plunder
items.summary: Black Morgan, a descendant of the infamous pirate, has been plundering cruise ships in the Pacific, and Supercar is the only vessel that can match his speed. But then he threatens to blow up a group of hostages with a torpedo if Mike tries to stop him.

infolabels.title: Pirate Plunder
infolabels.plot: Black Morgan, a descendant of the infamous pirate, has been plundering cruise ships in the Pacific, and Supercar is the only vessel that can match his speed. But then he threatens to blow up a group of hostages with a torpedo if Mike tries to stop him.

items.title: S01E14 - A Little Art
items.summary: When a painting he just bought is stolen from Dr. Beaker, he discovers that it contained a clue to the secret hiding place of a forger's plates for printing counterfeit money.

infolabels.title: A Little Art
infolabels.plot: When a painting he just bought is stolen from Dr. Beaker, he discovers that it contained a clue to the secret hiding place of a forger's plates for printing counterfeit money.

items.title: S01E15 - Flight of Fancy
items.summary: Jimmy has a dream in which he and Mitch use Supercar to rescue a princess.

infolabels.title: Flight of Fancy
infolabels.plot: Jimmy has a dream in which he and Mitch use Supercar to rescue a princess.

items.title: S01E16 - Deep Seven
items.summary: On a test dive to the sea floor, Supercar has engine trouble and then becomes entangled in the cable of an unexploded mine.

infolabels.title: Deep Seven
infolabels.plot: On a test dive to the sea floor, Supercar has engine trouble and then becomes entangled in the cable of an unexploded mine.

items.title: S01E17 - Hostage
items.summary: While Dr. Beaker is on vacation in Ireland, two men kidnap a girl and force him to call Mike Mercury for help.

infolabels.title: Hostage
infolabels.plot: While Dr. Beaker is on vacation in Ireland, two men kidnap a girl and force him to call Mike Mercury for help.

items.title: S01E18 - The Sunken Temple
items.summary: Mike and Beaker help a history professor excavate an underwater cavern, but they are unprepared to encounter a stolen safe full of money and a falling statue.

infolabels.title: The Sunken Temple
infolabels.plot: Mike and Beaker help a history professor excavate an underwater cavern, but they are unprepared to encounter a stolen safe full of money and a falling statue.

items.title: S01E19 - The Lost City
items.summary: Forced off course on its way to the South Pole, Supercar is forced to land in the ruins of an ancient city, where its passengers discover the secret hideout of a mad scientist who is planning to destroy Washington D.C. with a guided missile.

infolabels.title: The Lost City
infolabels.plot: Forced off course on its way to the South Pole, Supercar is forced to land in the ruins of an ancient city, where its passengers discover the secret hideout of a mad scientist who is planning to destroy Washington D.C. with a guided missile.

items.title: S01E20 - Trapped in the Depths
items.summary: Mike takes Supercar deep into the ocean to rescue scientists trapped in a bathyscaphe on the sea floor.

infolabels.title: Trapped in the Depths
infolabels.plot: Mike takes Supercar deep into the ocean to rescue scientists trapped in a bathyscaphe on the sea floor.

items.title: S01E21 - The Dragon of Ho Meng
items.summary: When a typhoon forces Supercar down near an island temple guarded by Ho Meng, the man thinks it is some kind of dragon until his daughter is kidnapped and he gets to see Supercar in action.

infolabels.title: The Dragon of Ho Meng
infolabels.plot: When a typhoon forces Supercar down near an island temple guarded by Ho Meng, the man thinks it is some kind of dragon until his daughter is kidnapped and he gets to see Supercar in action.

items.title: S01E22 - The Magic Carpet
items.summary: The Supercar team goes to Kirikan, an isolated kingdom in southern Asia, on a mission to deliver medical supplies to save a prince's life, but their efforts are thwarted by an attempted coup.

infolabels.title: The Magic Carpet
infolabels.plot: The Supercar team goes to Kirikan, an isolated kingdom in southern Asia, on a mission to deliver medical supplies to save a prince's life, but their efforts are thwarted by an attempted coup.

items.title: S01E23 - Supercar "Take One"
items.summary: When the team uses a newly-acquired movie camera to document Supercar's abilities, the film accidentally falls into the hands of some spies, so Mike and crew have to fly to New York to retrieve it.

infolabels.title: Supercar "Take One"
infolabels.plot: When the team uses a newly-acquired movie camera to document Supercar's abilities, the film accidentally falls into the hands of some spies, so Mike and crew have to fly to New York to retrieve it.

items.title: S01E24 - Crash Landing
items.summary: When engine trouble forces Supercar to land in the African jungle, the first night goes well until Mike and Dr. Beaker wake up to find Mitch missing.

infolabels.title: Crash Landing
infolabels.plot: When engine trouble forces Supercar to land in the African jungle, the first night goes well until Mike and Dr. Beaker wake up to find Mitch missing.

items.title: S01E25 - The Tracking of Masterspy
items.summary: Pretending to be a reporter, Masterspy manages to steal the secret plans for Supercar, or so he thinks. Mike has actually allowed him to steal a tracking device that will allow Supercar to follow him back to his hideout.

infolabels.title: The Tracking of Masterspy
infolabels.plot: Pretending to be a reporter, Masterspy manages to steal the secret plans for Supercar, or so he thinks. Mike has actually allowed him to steal a tracking device that will allow Supercar to follow him back to his hideout.

items.title: S01E26 - The White Line
items.summary: Baffled by a series of armored car robberies, Scotland Yard calls in he Supercar team, but when Dr. Beaker decides to take the wheel for the next delivery, he is unaware that he is headed for a deadly trap.

infolabels.title: The White Line
infolabels.plot: Baffled by a series of armored car robberies, Scotland Yard calls in he Supercar team, but when Dr. Beaker decides to take the wheel for the next delivery, he is unaware that he is headed for a deadly trap.

items.title: S02E01 - The Runaway Train
items.summary: When Masterspy sabotages an experimental nuclear powered train in an attempt to kill Dr. Beaker, Mike's only chance to save him is to use an untested magnet designed to grab small vehicles.

infolabels.title: The Runaway Train
infolabels.plot: When Masterspy sabotages an experimental nuclear powered train in an attempt to kill Dr. Beaker, Mike's only chance to save him is to use an untested magnet designed to grab small vehicles.

items.title: S02E02 - Precious Cargo
items.summary: Professor Popkiss orders a special cooking wine from France, but when the crate arrives everyone gets quite a surprise from its contents - there's a girl inside.

infolabels.title: Precious Cargo
infolabels.plot: Professor Popkiss orders a special cooking wine from France, but when the crate arrives everyone gets quite a surprise from its contents - there's a girl inside.

items.title: S02E03 - Operation Superstork
items.summary: When Mitch unties a rope that is securing the Professor's latest project, a gas-filled balloon, it takes off with Mike, Jimmy, and Dr. Beaker aboard. So it appars to be up to Professor Popkiss to fly Supercar to their rescue.

infolabels.title: Operation Superstork
infolabels.plot: When Mitch unties a rope that is securing the Professor's latest project, a gas-filled balloon, it takes off with Mike, Jimmy, and Dr. Beaker aboard. So it appars to be up to Professor Popkiss to fly Supercar to their rescue.

items.title: S02E04 - Hi-Jack
items.summary: What at first seems a simple job training airplane pilots turns into a situation where Supercar must stop Masterspy and Zarin from taking over an airliner in mid flight.

infolabels.title: Hi-Jack
infolabels.plot: What at first seems a simple job training airplane pilots turns into a situation where Supercar must stop Masterspy and Zarin from taking over an airliner in mid flight.

items.title: S02E05 - Calling Charlie Queen
items.summary: Answering a distress call, Mike and Beaker find that a Professor Karloff plans to take over America by reducing all its citizens to miniature size, but then find themselves on the wrong end of his shrinking ray.

infolabels.title: Calling Charlie Queen
infolabels.plot: Answering a distress call, Mike and Beaker find that a Professor Karloff plans to take over America by reducing all its citizens to miniature size, but then find themselves on the wrong end of his shrinking ray.

items.title: S02E06 - Space for Mitch
items.summary: Mike must take Supercar into oribt to rescue his pet monkey Mitch, who has accidentally launched himself in a rocket to outer space.

infolabels.title: Space for Mitch
infolabels.plot: Mike must take Supercar into oribt to rescue his pet monkey Mitch, who has accidentally launched himself in a rocket to outer space.

items.title: S02E07 - Atomic Witch Hunt
items.summary: On the hunt for the person who engineered the planting of atomic bombs all over the United States, the Supercar team find themselves captured by the culprit, a villainous sheriff.

infolabels.title: Atomic Witch Hunt
infolabels.plot: On the hunt for the person who engineered the planting of atomic bombs all over the United States, the Supercar team find themselves captured by the culprit, a villainous sheriff.

items.title: S02E08 - 70-B-Lo
items.summary: Professor Popkiss comes down with appendicitis. After the operation, Mike has to fly to the Arctic to get the closest blood donor who has Professor Popkiss's blood type.

infolabels.title: 70-B-Lo
infolabels.plot: Professor Popkiss comes down with appendicitis. After the operation, Mike has to fly to the Arctic to get the closest blood donor who has Professor Popkiss's blood type.

items.title: S02E09 - The Sky's the Limit
items.summary: Masterspy's latest plan to gain possession of Supercar is to offer to buy it outright - using counterfeit money.

infolabels.title: The Sky's the Limit
infolabels.plot: Masterspy's latest plan to gain possession of Supercar is to offer to buy it outright - using counterfeit money.

items.title: S02E10 - Jail Break
items.summary: A helicopter arrives at Black Rock carrying criminals who have broken out of prison and demand at gunpoint that Supercar fly them to a safe haven in Mexico.

infolabels.title: Jail Break
infolabels.plot: A helicopter arrives at Black Rock carrying criminals who have broken out of prison and demand at gunpoint that Supercar fly them to a safe haven in Mexico.

items.title: S02E11 - The Day That Time Stood Still
items.summary: In the middle of Mike's birthday party, a stranger from outer space arrives and freezes time for everyone but Mike.

infolabels.title: The Day That Time Stood Still
infolabels.plot: In the middle of Mike's birthday party, a stranger from outer space arrives and freezes time for everyone but Mike.

items.title: S02E12 - Transatlantic Cable
items.summary: The Supercar team discovers that Masterspy has tapped a transatlantic cable, and is able to use this to track him back to his underwater lair.

infolabels.title: Transatlantic Cable
infolabels.plot: The Supercar team discovers that Masterspy has tapped a transatlantic cable, and is able to use this to track him back to his underwater lair.

items.title: S02E13 - King Kool
items.summary: Mitch switchs places with a musical gorilla.

infolabels.title: King Kool
infolabels.plot: Mitch switchs places with a musical gorilla.
